zh.Beerfelden, Erbach, Starkenburg, Hessen,: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.於1663年4月18日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登時，他的父親Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.23歲，母親Eva Menges23歲。他於1687年5月3日與Anna Volk在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登被列為mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker。他去世於1709年3月23日在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登享年45歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.于1663年4月18日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登时，他的父亲Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.23岁，母亲Eva Menges23岁。他于1687年5月3日与Anna Volk在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登被列为mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker。他去世于1709年3月23日在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登享年45岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Kumpf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hermann, Kurt, Otto.
German: nickname for a short stout man, from Middle High German kumpf ‘(small) measure of grain, pouch (for a whetstone)’. Compare Kump .

variants.name: Kump
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Mathias, Alois, Gerhard, Traude.
German: metonymic occupational name for a bowl maker, from Middle Low German kump ‘(wooden) bowl’.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. was born on 18 April 1663, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, his father, Johann Peter Kumpf Sr., was 23 and his mother, Eva Menges, was 23. He married Anna Volk on 3 May 1687, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker in Beerfelden, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany. He died on 23 March 1709, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 45, and was buried in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. est né le 18 avril 1663, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, son père, Johann Peter Kumpf Sr., avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eva Menges, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Volk le 3 mai 1687, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1709, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.Beerfelden, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. am 18. April 1663 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. 23 und seine Mutter Eva Menges 23. Er hat am 3. Mai 1687 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen Anna Volk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. März 1709 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland und wurde in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. è nato il il 18 aprile 1663 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, il suo padre, Johann Peter Kumpf Sr., aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Eva Menges, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Volk il 3 maggio 1687, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Germania. Morì il 23 marzo 1709, nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.が1663年4月18日にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで生まれた時，父Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.は23歳，母Eva Mengesは23歳であった。1687年5月3日にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでAnna Volkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。ドイツボルクスタアト ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでの職業はmayor, justice, woolman, clothmakerと記録されている。彼は1709年3月23日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで45歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.Beerfelden, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.(이)가 1663년 4월 18일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Menges(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1687년 5월 3일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Anna Volk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker이었다. 그는 1709년 3월 23일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.Beerfelden, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. nasceu em 18 de abril de 1663, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, seu pai, Johann Peter Kumpf Sr., tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eva Menges, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Volk em 3 de maio de 1687, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1709, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.Beerfelden, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: бирфелден, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. родился 18 апреля 1663 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, его отцу по имени Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eva Menges, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Volk 3 мая 1687 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия. Он умер 23 марта 1709 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. nació el 18 de abril de 1663, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, su papá, Johann Peter Kumpf Sr., tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eva Menges, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Volk el 3 de mayo de 1687, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era mayor, justice, woolman, clothmaker en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemania. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1709, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania.
